gene_region.label: F5 transcribed interval
gene_region.definition: Canonical F5 genomic interval on GRCh37 / hg19 from Ensembl GRCh37 lookup, aligned to the hg19 coordinate system used by this app.

promoter_review_region.label: Operational promoter review window
promoter_review_region.definition: A practical 1 kb upstream window relative to the reverse-strand transcription start, used to flag promoter-adjacent coverage before the canonical gene interval.

promoter_hotspot_region.label: Promoter-associated CpG review window
promoter_hotspot_region.definition: Promoter-proximal CpG-focused span represented by the bundled EPIC subset and used here as the main methylation-review hotspot.

gene_context.gene_summary: F5 encodes coagulation factor V, a cofactor for prothrombinase complex assembly. This bundle emphasizes thrombin generation, activated protein C resistance, clotting cascade amplification, and venous thrombosis biology.
gene_context.clinical_context: The local F5 bundle is coagulation and thrombosis review oriented. Interpret markers through exact allele class, zygosity, ancestry, phenotype, and assay context rather than as stand-alone deterministic calls.
variant_effect_overview: F5 variants can alter or tag thrombin generation, activated protein C resistance, clotting cascade amplification, and venous thrombosis biology; effect direction depends on allele class, tissue, dosage, and biological context.
Common markers, pharmacogenetic alleles, structural events, and high-impact pathogenic variants should be kept separate during interpretation.
gene_context.methylation_interpretation: F5 methylation should be treated as local regulatory context around a thrombin generation, activated protein C resistance, clotting cascade amplification, and venous thrombosis biology gene. Promoter-proximal methylation can support expression-potential review, but it should not replace genotype, RNA, protein, or phenotype data.
methylation_effects: Promoter or first-exon methylation may suggest a more restrained or permissive local expression state for F5.
Because F5 biology is tissue and pathway dependent, methylation values are context rather than a stand-alone biomarker.

Combined sequence plus methylation findings are most useful when interpreted against thrombin generation, activated protein C resistance, clotting cascade amplification, and venous thrombosis biology.
methylation_condition_research: Epigenetic regulation studies that use F5 promoter or gene-body methylation as expression-context evidence.
Variant-plus-methylation review for thrombin generation, activated protein C resistance, clotting cascade amplification, and venous thrombosis biology.

evidence.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000198734: F5 coordinate source

biorender_visuals.label: F5 biochemical figure starter
biorender_visuals.focus: F5: thrombin generation, activated protein C resistance, clotting cascade amplification, and venous thrombosis biology

Blood vessel (with red  blood cells, anemic)
biorender_visuals.usage_note: BioRender template and icon-library search results are bundled as figure starters. Open the template link in BioRender, then add or replace the listed icons to make a gene-specific biochemical pathway image.

gene_context.concrete_variant_prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests a F5 coagulation and thrombosis review thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to thrombin generation, activated protein C resistance, clotting cascade amplification, and venous thrombosis biology and Factor V Leiden thrombophilia context, Venous thromboembolism association research. Treat this as pathway triage until the exact allele has external classification and phenotype support.

variant_records.clinical_interpretation: rs6025 (Factor V Leiden / R506Q) is curated as a F5 marker for Factor V Leiden thrombophilia context, Venous thromboembolism association research. Read it through genotype dosage, phenotype context, and the thrombin generation, activated protein C resistance, clotting cascade amplification, and venous thrombosis biology pathway rather than as a stand-alone deterministic result.
variant_records.clinical_significance: Curated research and clinical-context marker; external clinical classification is required for diagnostic use.
functional_effects: Can modify or tag thrombin generation, activated protein C resistance, clotting cascade amplification, and venous thrombosis biology.
Best interpreted with tissue, ancestry, phenotype, and assay context.
research_context: Use this marker as a F5 pathway-context signal, not as a stand-alone diagnosis.
Sequence, methylation, expression, and protein data may point in different directions and should be reconciled.
variant_records.methylation_interpretation: Pair rs6025 (Factor V Leiden / R506Q) with F5 methylation only as local regulatory context; methylation does not prove the variant's biochemical effect.

literature_findings.genotypes: rs6025 (Factor V Leiden / R506Q) or linked F5 locus genotype states
literature_findings.phenotype: Factor V Leiden thrombophilia context, Venous thromboembolism association research
literature_findings.finding: The local curation treats rs6025 (Factor V Leiden / R506Q) as a gene-specific marker for Factor V Leiden thrombophilia context, Venous thromboembolism association research and thrombin generation, activated protein C resistance, clotting cascade amplification, and venous thrombosis biology.
